guidedImport.title: Import your existing data
guidedImport.description: Use this format guide to convert your grocery list, recipes, or to-dos into the JSON format Casita needs.
guidedImport.invalidName: Each entry must have a non-empty "name" field.
guidedImport.formatGuideIntro: Convert your data to this JSON format. Omit any key whose array is empty.
guidedImport.formatGuideRules:
Rules:
- Every entry must have a non-empty "name".
- Set onShoppingList to true only if the item needs to be bought right now.
- For recipes, preserve headings and steps using markdown format.
- Do not invent data — only include data from your source.

changelog.e0_desc: The app is now available in English, Spanish, Portuguese (Portugal), and Italian. Change your language from Settings → Account. More languages coming soon.
changelog.e1_desc: Drag-and-drop reordering is now atomic (no more partial failures). Dropping a card onto a collapsed Done column now auto-expands it. Switching workflow from Board to Simple cleanly resets statuses in one step.
changelog.e2_desc: To-dos now support categories, assignees, due dates, priority, frequency, URLs, and notes. A new Kanban board view with drag-and-drop replaces the old list, and a full-page form replaces the sheet. Configure workflow style and categories from Settings → To-Dos.
changelog.e3_desc: The home screen shopping card now gives smart trip guidance — recommending your best store, handling tied stores, and surfacing items clearly whether or not you use supermarkets.
changelog.e4_desc: A new import wizard lets you paste a grocery list, recipes, or to-dos and have them automatically structured and brought into Casita. New households are also walked through an optional import step right after setup.
changelog.e5_desc: You can now support Casita and see what's new directly from Settings.
changelog.e6_desc: Deleting a concept now cascades to clear references and shows an undo toast.
changelog.e7_desc: Settings has been reordered and each section now has a cleaner, more consistent layout.
changelog.e8_desc: You can now delete your account, export your data, and manage privacy settings from the new Privacy section in Settings.
changelog.e9_desc: Each household member now has a profile with their own colour theme.
changelog.e10_desc: You can install Casita on your home screen directly from the app.
changelog.e11_desc: Recipe instructions now support markdown formatting, and you can remove images from recipes.
changelog.e12_desc: Each household can now set its own colour theme from Settings.
changelog.e13_desc: The app has been rebuilt with a refreshed look using a consistent design system.
changelog.e14_desc: Added quantity controls and other UX improvements to the shopping list.
changelog.e15_desc: You can now invite people to your household via a shared invite link.
changelog.e16_desc: Connect your Google Calendar to see events alongside your household tasks.
changelog.e17_desc: Settings pages have been reorganised with a cleaner layout.
changelog.e18_desc: Connect multiple Google accounts (personal + work) from Settings → Calendar. New week and month views let you see your schedule at a glance — switch between Agenda, Week, and Month with the toggle at the top of the Calendar tab.
changelog.e19_desc: Household owners can now enable or disable areas for everyone. Each member can then pin up to three areas directly to their tab bar, and anything not pinned stays a tap away. Customise from Settings → Areas & Tabs.
changelog.e20_desc: Exporting your household now preserves full detail on re-import — shopping items keep their supermarket assignments, and to-dos carry over their notes, URLs, recurrence settings, and categories. Any category that doesn't exist yet in the target household is created automatically.

welcome.title: Welcome to {{name}}
welcome.description: Your household in one place — tasks, shopping, recipes, and events, all shared with everyone at home.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: See what's coming up — add events, connect Google Calendar, and keep your household in sync.

todos.title: To-Dos
todos.description: Track household tasks, assign them to members, set priorities and due dates.

shopping.title: Shopping
shopping.description: Build a shared shopping list, organise by store, and check items off together.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Save your favourite recipes, plan what to cook, and turn ingredients into shopping list items.
